argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = Math.min({{ limit }} || 20, 30); const resp = await fetch('https://api.bilibili.com/x/web-interface/history/cursor?ps=' + limit + '&type=archive', { credentials: 'include' }); const payload = await resp.json(); const list = payload?.data?.list ?? []; const formatDuration = (seconds) => { const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60); const s = seconds % 60; return m + ':' + s.toString().padStart(2, '0'); }; return list.slice(0, {{ limit }} || 20).map((item, i) => { const progress = item.progress ?? 0; const duration = item.duration ?? 0; let progressStr; if (progress < 0 || progress >= duration) { progressStr = '已看完'; } else { const pct = duration > 0 ? Math.round(progress / duration * 100) : 0; progressStr = formatDuration(progress) + '/' + formatDuration(duration) + ' (' + pct + '%)'; } return { rank: i + 1, title: item.title ?? '', author: item.author_name ?? '', progress: progressStr, url: item.history?.bvid ? 'https://www.bilibili.com/video/' + item.history.bvid : '' }; }); }
